speaker: speaker1
text: I hear you are expecting your family .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , my parents , and soon my brother as well .

speaker: speaker1
text: I didn't know you had a brother .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , yes , he is two years older than me . He lives in New Zealand so I don't see him that often .

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , nice . Is he coming on his own or with the family ?

speaker: speaker2
text: His son is coming as well . He wants to go to university here in England so they will visit a few universities while they are here .

speaker: speaker1
text: Does your brother have just one son ?

speaker: speaker2
text: No , he has two daughters as well . His wife and daughters are visiting her parents . So I won't see them .

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm sure your parents are looking forward to seeing their grandson .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh yes , they are really looking forward to it . They went to New Zealand last year and loved it .

speaker: speaker1
text: So when are they all coming ?

speaker: speaker2
text: My parents are already here . My brother and nephew are arriving on Monday .
